truth_note: This package is publish-ready as creative + metadata. Actual publishing still requires OAuth, MP4 render, private upload, and review.

platform_fit.style: Gen Z cinematic micro-myth, fast enough to retain, soft enough for family-safe dedication
platform_fit.audience: general audience and family-safe viewers; if final creative is primarily directed to children, mark Made for Kids before public release

viral_simulation_model.scoring_logic: Scores concepts for hook clarity, retention beats, loopability, emotional safety, originality, brand fit, and policy safety. It does not guarantee virality.

video.title: POV: A Tiny Dream Gets a Guardian
alternate_titles: When Your Small Dream Finds a Guardian
video.hook_text: POV: your tiny dream just got a guardian.
video.dedication: Dedicated to every little light brave enough to dream past the dark.
script_voiceover: POV: your tiny dream just got a guardian.
In the cloud factory, even the smallest spark gets protected.
Silver paws. Paper moon. Violet sky.
No dream is too small when it learns how to fly.
CERBERRA watches the night until your light becomes a signal.
lyrics_optional_music_layer: Little light, wake in the cloud,
Silver paws are guarding you now,
Fold a moon from paper and wire,
Tiny dreams can teach stars fire.
video.visual_style_prompt: Vertical 9:16 premium animated short. Deep violet cloud factory, tiny glowing spark, protective silver robotic wolf, paper moon, soft stars, cinematic Gen Z pacing, warm mythic atmosphere, safe and hopeful, no real children, no frightening imagery, no cheap cartoon look.

shotlist.scene: Tiny violet spark wakes in a dark cloud factory.
shotlist.overlay: POV: your tiny dream just got a guardian

shotlist.scene: Silver robotic wolf paw shields the spark from digital wind.
Spark folds a glowing paper moon.
Paper moon rises through violet gears and soft clouds.
shotlist.overlay: tiny dreams can teach stars fire

shotlist.scene: Moon becomes a lantern over a sky full of sparks.
CERBERRA constellation appears, loop fades back to tiny spark.

metadata.description: A gentle original CERBERRA micro-short dedicated to every little light brave enough to dream past the dark. Built as a private-first release with safety and audience review before public publishing.

simulation_result.decision: Render MP4 and upload private. Public release only after review.

release_checklist: Confirm audio is original or licensed.
Confirm no real child faces and no scary imagery.
If primarily child-directed, set Made for Kids.
Do not add comment bait or sales links if Made for Kids.
